steps.title: Identify what y means
steps.content: The variable $y$ represents the total amount of fish, in pounds, eaten during the full $6$ days. It is not asking for the daily rate.

steps.title: Use the stated total
steps.content: The problem says the polar bear ate $28.8$ pounds of fish in those $6$ days, so the equation for the total amount is $$ y=28.8 $$ The answer is C.
